intro: In accordance with the provisions of Articles 6-III and 19 of Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on Confidence in the Digital Economy, known as L.C.E.N., we bring to the attention of users and visitors to the site: https:// www.lucas-virieuxpetit-portfolio.com/ the following information:
sendMessage: Send a message via the form
hostAddress: OVH — Headquarters: 2 rue Kellermann - 59100 Roubaix - France
intellectualProperty_text1: Lucas Virieux-Petit owns the intellectual property rights or holds the user rights to all the elements accessible on the site.
intellectualProperty_text2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, adaptation of all or part of the elements of the site, whatever the means or process used, is prohibited, except with the prior written authorization of Luvas Virieux-Petit.
intellectualProperty_text3: Any unauthorized use of the site or any element it contains will be considered as constituting an infringement and prosecuted in accordance with the provisions of articles L.335-2 and following of the Intellectual Property Code.
form_text1: You may be required to provide me with your e-mail address and telephone number when you fill out the contact form on the site https://www.lucas-virieuxpetit-portfolio.com/.
form_text2: Your personal data will only be used to contact you again and under no circumstances will they be transferred to third parties or stored on a server.
